stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced a new generation of AI GPUs with 50% efficiency gains, sparking frenzy in AI sector. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting data center spending. Market psychology: FOMO driving buys, reminiscent of 2023 AI boom. Historical parallel: Dot-com era chip rallies. Analogies: Like fuel for the AI engine; rocket boosters for cloud computing.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal headlines on NVDA's Q1 earnings beat and Blackwell chip launch. X sentiment (semantic search) shows 85% positive posts with high engagement on AI future, outweighing supply concerns.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/hold for 10-15% upside in week; target $1050.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or cover shorts; potential 20% squeeze if momentum continues.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst, China trade tensions, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong consensus from news and X data, high volume confirmation.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed Robotaxi unveil to October due to regulatory hurdles. Implications: Slowed EV growth narrative, higher capex needs. Psychology: Disappointment erodes hype. Parallel: 2020 battery day delays. Analogies: Car with flat tire on highway; promise of flying car grounded.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News on delay from Reuters/CNBC; X keyword search shows spike in negative memes, #TeslaDelay trending with 60% bearish sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Limited; dip buy at $230 for rebound.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon Musk tweet reversal, surprise positive update.

stocks.justification: Clear news trigger but volatile history tempers certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI partners with NVDA for liquid-cooled AI servers, riding AI wave. Implications: Margin expansion from premium hardware. Psychology: Guilt by association bullishness. Parallel: 2021 server boom. Analogies: Body for NVDA's brain; turbocharger for AI race.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Press releases on partnership; X semantic search high positive buzz in AI threads.

stocks.justification: Synergy with NVDA news, volume surge.

stocks.impact_theory: ARM reports PC chip designs winning Apple, Qualcomm deals. Implications: Shift from x86 boosts efficiency. Psychology: Underdog story excites. Parallel: Mobile chip shift 2010s. Analogies: Efficient engine replacing gas guzzler; brain redesign for AI era.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings call highlights; X posts praise ARM architecture surge.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir wins $500M DoD contract for AI analytics. Implications: Government revenue stability. Psychology: Defense stock premium. Parallel: Post-9/11 contractor rallies. Analogies: Crystal ball for military; data oracle in chaos.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Gov contract announcement; X hype from retail traders.

stocks.justification: Niche win but profitability doubts linger.
